meaning: n.旅行用品商,运动用具商
examples: Jack Sumner was a guide and outfitter who ran a trading post in the Colorado Rockies.
The company is also the exclusive outfitter of the Wimbledon tennis tournament, through 2010.
We chose to go with OARS, a well-known and respected outfitter who runs trips all over the world.
Because we had no backcountry experience, my friend Annemarie and I enlisted a guide from Canadian Skyline Adventures, the only Jasper-based outfitter that leads hikes of the Skyline Trail.
The next day, book a tour with Secret Hvar ( secrethvar.com), a local outfitter that takes visitors into the island's interior and to see hidden chunks of coastline.
